name: Positional Submission Reasoning Seed
description: Initial seed tests for Jiu Jitsu positional reasoning. These follow the SkateBench JSON suite shape while the glossary database evolves toward richer rubric scoring.
system_prompt: You are evaluating adult black-belt sport Jiu Jitsu. Answer concisely. For each position, name plausible submissions and include the key control condition or setup logic that makes each attack realistic. Distinguish gi-only grips when relevant.

tests.prompt: In no-gi, from K-guard, name two plausible submission directions and explain the positional connection that makes them available.
From technical mount, what submission is most directly available and what control condition usually creates the opening?
In the gi, from spider guard, name two common attacking directions and the grip condition that makes the position work.
